aas.name: Hunter's Attack Power
aas.description: This passive ability increases your attack power by 20 points. Requirements: level 8.

aas.name: Innate Called Shot
aas.description: Grants the Ranger the ability to unleash a double bow shot on stationary targets. Requirements: level 1.

aas.name: Unbounded Strikethrough
aas.description: This passive ability increases the chance you will strike through your opponent's active defenses, such as dodge, block, parry, and riposte, by 10/20/30%. Requirements: level 12.

aas.name: Weapon Mastery of the Scout
aas.description: Increases the base damage of your archery attacks by 30/60/90%. Requirements: level 1. }
